name: Musto, Oracle of Gusto
name_jp: ガスタの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>官</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ムスト
desc: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Gusto" monster in your Graveyard and 1 face-up monster on the field; shuffle the first target into the Deck, and if you do, negate the second target's effects until the End Phase.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Gusto" monster in your Graveyard and 1 face-up monster on the field; shuffle the first target into the Deck, and if you do, negate the second target's effects until the End Phase.
eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Gusto" monster in your Graveyard and 1 face-up monster on the field; shuffle the first target into the Deck, and if you do, negate the second target's effects until the End Phase.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
